prompt: Review the diodes component page for technical accuracy: content/components/03-diodes.md
assertions: Identifies the '20V DC range' meter mode instruction as a critical error (should be diode mode)
Flags silicon diode forward voltage '1.4-2.0V' as a critical error (correct range is 0.55-0.80V)
Flags '0.55-0.80 ohms' in the forward voltage table as a critical error (should be volts, not ohms)
Presents findings in a structured report with Critical Errors and Fact-Check Items sections
Offers to apply fixes with options: all, comma-separated IDs, interactive, or skip
